rationale: Both reviews surface the identical real api-design defects (public tautology at curvature_gauge_transformation, vacuous True field on IsCompactOrientedManifold, and direct re-export of banach_steinhaus) that are directly visible and material in the diff; acting on either therefore removes exactly the same misleading public declarations. Review 1's extra 'entire file out of scope' claim is not grounded in the diff and leads to the same net outcome, so no distinction in resulting PR quality.
